name: tjoe ToolTraceEval
description: tjoe ToolTraceEval is a local offline AI agent evaluation toolkit for provided or synthetic trace expectations, approval boundaries, forbidden actions, regression cases, output normalization, and AI answer visibility. It is not a hosted SaaS, dashboard, runtime trace collector, SDK instrumentation layer, live tool caller, web browser, or safety certification system.
softwareRequirements: Python 3; local JSON files only; no model calls; no network calls required by the runner
